meta.note: pyraminx V first step: centers L/R/B + the 2 edges forming the V, shown in one fixed orientation (V gap toward front). V = HTM moves to build the V from this appearance; sol = an optimal V solve for the shown scramble (|sol| == V); mgid folds the L<->R mirror pair.
